instructions.instruction: Characterise what the source actually does mechanically, independent of its name or the asker's framing, before judging fit.
Check overlap against existing capability (D1-D9 scorers, validate, duplication, eval runner, helper skills) before proposing to import or port anything.
Never port a source's hardcoded, project-specific literals; extract only the generic kernel and build it natively.
Keep novelty and need separate: a technique can be novel and still not needed by this project.
Render exactly one verdict band (Good fit, Partial fit, or No fit) and record it as a house-standard finding.
Name the salvageable idea explicitly, or state that there is none, rather than manufacturing a takeaway.
Embed the structured fit-assessment block from the template under the marker, keep its verdict and value aligned with the prose, and validate it against the schema.
